## gh-145: Local cache of fleet loop shapes

**Status:** Completed

**Summary:** Lightweight local cache of loop/chain shapes per instance, refreshed on connect and opportunistically. No UI surface, purely invisible plumbing.

**Verification:** `pnpm typecheck` passes (no new errors). 5 Vitest unit tests pass covering chain-building logic and data integrity.
